title: Italian Options Tartan Ribbon 38mm x 15m – Red, Green & Gold Fabric Gift Wrapping Ribbon for Christmas, Crafts, Hampers & Festive Decorations
features: Luxurious Woven Fabric – Made from premium cloth ribbon with a smooth, durable texture that adds a refined finish to every bow, wrap or festive display.
Wide 38mm Design – Generously sized for statement gift wrapping, creating large elegant bows, and decorating wreaths or Christmas trees with ease.
Rich Festive Colours – Features a traditional tartan blend of Red, Green and Gold tones, bringing timeless seasonal charm to any gift or décor project.
Long 15-Metre Roll – Offers excellent value and flexibility, ideal for multiple presents, craft projects, floristry, or creating consistent event décor themes.
Trusted Italian Options Quality – Designed by a UK packaging specialist renowned for stylish and reliable ribbons perfect for Christmas and year-round celebrations.
description: Tartan ribbon in red green and gold. 38mm ribbon width. 15 metre roll length. Perfect for Christmas gifts.
